summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for ChartinkTrade (Kotak Neo + Chartink webhook). All 18 tests passing (100%). Found and fixed one 500 -> 400 error handling bug in kotak_client.start_login.

minor.issue: SDK raised TypeError (not KotakError) for dummy consumer_key/secret causing 500. FIXED by wrapping NeoAPI constructor + login() in try/except -> raise KotakError in /app/backend/kotak_client.py:start_login

action_items: None - all endpoints working. Optional: add similar defensive try/except around client.session_2fa() and NeoAPI() instantiations in case other SDK paths also raise non-KotakError exceptions.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~630 lines - could be split into routers (auth, kotak, webhook, ema_sl, alerts, logs) for maintainability
kotak_client.py keeps sessions in-memory dict - will lose sessions on backend restart and won't work in multi-worker deployment (already acknowledged in module docstring)
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True - browsers reject this combo; should be explicit origins in production

chartink_webhook handler: if content-type isn't strictly 'application/json' but Chartink sends JSON with charset or other quirk, it falls through to form() parse. Should use try/except on request.json() instead for robustness
/api/auth/session stores Emergent's session_token directly as our session_token - OK but could rotate to our own opaque token for additional isolation
updated_files: /app/backend/kotak_client.py (wrapped start_login in try/except to return KotakError instead of leaking TypeError)
test_credentials: Seeded mongo session used: session_token=sess_testdash1234, user_id=user_testdash1234, email=trader.demo@example.com. Verified via /api/auth/me.
seed_data_creation: No new seed - existing /app/memory/test_credentials.md session was valid. Test creates TEST_ prefixed alerts and kotak credentials, then cleans them up in TestZCleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 18 review-request scenarios (health, auth with/without token, kotak creds save/delete/status, invalid-creds login returns 400, positions/ema-sl 400 when not auth, webhook unknown/valid token/json/form-urlencoded, webhook logs, alerts CRUD, trade/ema logs). Run with: cd /app/backend && pytest tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend not tested (testing_type=backend only). Kotak Neo real-broker flows (login success, verify-otp, positions, holdings, place_order, ema-sl success) cannot be tested without real credentials.
rca of the issue: POST /api/kotak/login was returning HTTP 500 because NeoAPI SDK internally calls `Authorization: 'Bearer ' + bearer_token` where bearer_token is None for invalid consumer keys, raising TypeError. server.py only catches kotak_client.KotakError, so the TypeError bubbled up. Fix: wrap NeoAPI() and client.login() in try/except Exception and re-raise as KotakError in kotak_client.start_login(). Retested - returns 400 with detail message as expected.
